placementCohorts.costFact: No provider or network call ran. The cohort used local CPU, memory, SQLite, and filesystem resources.
placementCohorts.result: The source-controlled local cohort completed generation 1 to 2 move, generation 2 to 3 failback, replay, stale-generation refusal, abort teardown, encrypted artifact deletion, and final helper teardown. The destination started a signature-verified TypeScript LSP. The retained control-session process stayed settled, no Codex executor resumed, and no work ref was accepted. DAP and native stayed unsupported because no signed executable profile is admitted for them.

placementCohorts.costFact: The run used an existing owner-managed GCE host. It created no cloud resource and added no measured infrastructure cost.
placementCohorts.result: An isolated process on the owner-managed Linux x64 host completed the production Pylon move, failback, replay, stale-generation refusal, encrypted artifact deletion, and teardown checks. The controller changed no standing service.

placementCohorts.costFact: The measured staging run cost 9968 micro-USD.
placementCohorts.result: The staging target completed checkpoint, source stop, fresh fork, restored content, second checkpoint, fresh fork-back, restored content, capability revocation, checkpoint deletion, and exact zero-residue cleanup. Phase latency values are conservative observed wall-clock upper bounds. CPU and memory values are target capacity bounds. Guest network policy allowed zero network bytes.

placementCohorts.costFact: No audited external provider is admitted or claimed.
placementCohorts.result: The provider lane is explicitly unclaimed.

omissions.fact: Checkpoints exclude live processes, terminals, native handles, credentials, Vim widget state, and theme widget state. Destinations start admitted helpers again.
No external audited provider is admitted or claimed.

recoveryFacts.scenario: The destination recovered from a verified checkpoint and completed failback with a fresh identity and generation.
The destination recovered from a verified checkpoint and completed failback with a fresh identity and generation.
The destination recovered from a verified checkpoint and completed failback with a fresh identity and generation.
